title: Evaluation of Electoral Integrity Programme: public opinion research wave 3
body: "The research covers public views towards and experiences of voting, the impacts of the changes introduced by the Electoral Integrity Programme to the process of voting and perceptions of electoral fraud.  This public opinion survey was conducted in the United Kingdom following the 4 July 2024 Parliamentary General Election. This publication also includes the data tables for wave 3 and additional data tables for survey work conducted in January 2025. "
